fix_diff:
diff --git a/devfleet.db b/devfleet.db
+INSERT/UPSERT devices(
+  id="48acf8c9-3549-442d-8838-0849ee2dc50d",
+  name="Mac 主设备 MODstore Bridge",
+  device_token_hash=sha256(DEVFLEET_DEVICE_TOKEN),
+  activated=1,
+  connection_allowed=1,
+  is_primary=1,
+  dev_tool="codex"
+)
+kickstart com.xcmax.para-main-agent/watchdog
root_cause: The migrated DevFleet SQLite DB had only inactive devices without device_token_hash, so the launchd e2e-agent token could not authenticate and bind to the fixed MODSTORE_PARA_DEVICE_ID.
symptom: Para API is healthy but self-maintenance loop says configured device is not online; /api/devices is empty
